title: Grilled Shrimp Skewers with Pacific Smoked Flavor
description: A simple and flavorful summer dish featuring shrimp, smoked flavor, and a hint of pacific spices.
instructions: Thread shrimp onto skewers, leaving a little space between each shrimp.
In a small bowl, mix together Pacific Rim seasoning blend, smoked paprika, lime juice, Aussie-Style olive oil, and Australian-Style soy sauce.
Brush the shrimp with the marinade, making sure they're evenly coated.
Grill the shrimp for 2-3 minutes per side, or until they're pink and cooked through.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional Pacific Rim seasoning blend if desired.
